description: Case style: Analog watch with a round stainless steel case for enhanced durability Dial style: Black dial with white hands Strap style: Black genuine leather strap with a yellow stitch and tang clasp for comfort and style Features: Branding on the 12 hour mark on the dial Screw to reset time Water resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to wear it out in the rain Warranty: 1 year
